Commented out the gender selection code in the personas page. Changes:

1. **Gender selection UI in the form** (lines 686-715) — commented out the Male/Female buttons
2. **Gender column header in the table** (line 493-494) — commented out
3. **Gender display in table rows** (lines 519-521) — commented out
4. **Updated grid layout** — removed the gender column from the grid classes

The gender selection UI is now hidden. The state and API calls remain, but users can no longer see or interact with gender selection. No linting errors were introduced.
